## Goal
This is the mandatory initial task check for Linear issue SOT-1435 ("アプリの使い方の説明"),
which was reopened (moved Todo) with a new instruction:

> これらのキャプチャをREADMEにも使ってください。既存のREADMEの画面キャプチャは置き換えてください。
> (Use these captures in the README too. Replace the existing README screen captures.)

"These captures" = the app how-to screenshots regenerated by PR#264, stored at
`frontend/public/howto/*.png` (agent-demo, board, tasks, register, ask, schedule, settings).

## Tasks (read-only verification — do NOT change code)
1. Confirm the issue is actionable (a concrete doc change is requested; no blocking ambiguity).
2. Inspect `README.md` and report EVERY image reference (grep for `![` and `.png`).
   - List which image files each reference points to.
3. Determine whether `README.md` ALREADY references the regenerated `frontend/public/howto/*.png`
   captures (relative paths), or whether it references some OTHER / stale / older screenshots that
   must be replaced.
4. Check whether any OTHER screenshots referenced by README are stale or missing.
5. Verify all `frontend/public/howto/*.png` files exist on disk and were regenerated by PR#264
   (git log for those files).

## Output
Write your report to `docs/ai/60_worker_codex_report.md` using the standard format
(Summary / Changed Files / Commands Run / Acceptance Criteria / Risks / Next Action).
In the Summary, explicitly answer: does README already embed the regenerated howto captures, or is
